description: A lab technician needs to log a new batch of patient samples, track them through an assay, and record their storage location.

nodes.task_description: Register a new batch of 20 plasma samples into the Laboratory Information Management System (LIMS).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates 20 new sample records, each with a unique barcode.

nodes.task_description: Associate the samples with a specific analytical test (e.g., 'ELISA for Biomarker X').

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly links all 20 samples to the scheduled test.

nodes.task_description: After the test, update the status of the samples to 'Analysis Complete'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the status for all samples.

nodes.task_description: Log the final storage location of the samples in the -80°C freezer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates each sample record with the correct freezer, rack, and box number.
